batches.title: Batch F — File System Query
batches.specialNote: All need stat(2) or statvfs(2) FFI. Add lean_coreutils_stat(path) → returns mode/size/nlink/uid/gid. lean_coreutils_statvfs(path) → returns total/available blocks. lean_coreutils_truncate(path, size) → truncate(2). install combines cp + stat + chmod.

batches.title: Batch G — Process/Signals
batches.specialNote: kill: needs kill(2) FFI (lean_coreutils_kill(pid, sig)). who: uses same getutxent FFI as users (already in c/coreutils.c).

batches.title: Batch H — Data Processing (Pure Lean)
batches.specialNote: All pure Lean — zero FFI needed. expr: evaluate integer/string expressions (recursive descent parser). base64: encode/decode using base64 alphabet. split: split input into files by size/line count. dd: convert and copy with block size options. pathchk: check pathname validity. ptx: produce permuted index.

batches.title: Batch I — Hash Computation (Pure Lean)
batches.specialNote: All pure Lean hash implementations — zero FFI needed. Implement MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512, BLAKE2b as pure functions in Logic.lean. Each reads stdin or files, outputs hex hash + filename.

batches.title: Batch J — Terminal/Misc (Pure Lean)
batches.specialNote: more: page through stdin (read a screen, wait for key, repeat). Pure Lean IO. mesg: check/set terminal write access (needs isatty FFI + /proc/self/fd/0 check).
